mdSummary:
# Avatar

Circular user image with initials fallback and status indicator.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Data Display/Cards & Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/avatar

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Avatar | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Avatar | Size | `AvatarSize` | `AvatarSize.Default` |  |
| Avatar | Shape | `AvatarShape` | `AvatarShape.Circle` |  |
| Avatar | Status | `AvatarStatus` | `AvatarStatus.None` |  |
| Avatar | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Avatar | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AvatarFallback | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AvatarFallback | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AvatarFallback | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AvatarGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| AvatarGroup | Max | `int` | `` |  |
| AvatarGroup | Total | `int` | `` |  |
| AvatarGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AvatarGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| AvatarImage | Src | `string?` | `` |  |
| AvatarImage | Alt | `string?` | `` |  |
| AvatarImage | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| AvatarImage | OnError | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| AvatarImage | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Avatar) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AvatarFallback) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (AvatarGroup) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects

- (none)

## Example
```razor
<Avatar />
```

## CSS variables
